caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied back and wearing black over-ear headphones and a black t-shirt is seated in a studio. She is positioned in front of a black microphone on a stand, with a white wall and a yellow vertical stripe in the background. Behind her, a screen displays the partial text "ohnson" and a sign that reads "Employees Only." Throughout the sequence, she is speaking, with her facial expressions and mouth movements changing as she talks. In the final frame, she raises her left arm and gestures with her hand. On-screen graphics appear in the lower sections of the frames, including a logo and text that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." The layout remains consistent across the frames, focusing on the woman from the chest up as she engages in a conversation.
